name: Listicle
best_for: topics that decompose into parallel, self-contained items
ideas with one standout item that can anchor the ending

beat_sequence.beat_job: Promise a specific number of concrete takeaways and hint that one of them is unexpected.
Deliver the items in rising order of usefulness so each one earns the next.
Land the strongest or most surprising item last so the promise resolves at the peak.
Tell the viewer to save the list or comment which item they are trying first.

retention_or_clarity_job: Numbered progress plus an escalating order keeps the viewer counting toward the best item.
avoid_when: The items are not genuinely parallel; a disguised narrative reads better as a story template.
Every item is equally flat; without a peak item the ending lands on nothing.
